feed.title: Scholar Alerts — Clean Feed
feed.subtitle: Google Scholar alerts reformatted as individual article entries

entry.title: Carbon Cycle Imbalances on Arid Terrestrial Planets with Implications for Venus
entry.content:
Authors: HT White-Gianella, J Krissansen-Totton - The Planetary Science Journal, 2026

Abstract: Arid terrestrial exoplanets are potentially abundant and are thus interesting targets in the search for life. In particular, M-dwarf planets such as those in the TRAPPIST-1 system may possess limited surface water, whereas early solar system terrestrials ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Astrobiology, Reviewer, Too: Exoplanets

Alert: Joshua Krissansen-Totton (author alert)

entry.title: Detecting entanglement from few partial transpose moments and their decay via weight enumerators
entry.content:
Authors: D Miller, J Eisert - arXiv preprint arXiv:2604.12576, 2026

Abstract: The $ p_3 $-PPT criterion is an experimentally viable relaxation of the well-known positive partial transposition (PPT) criterion for the certification of quantum entanglement. Recently, it has been generalized to various families of entanglement ...

Alert: Jens Eisert (author alert)

entry.title: Reference genome assembly of the false killer whale (Pseudorca crassidens)
entry.content:
Authors: KM Hernandez, KK Martien, RW Baird, MT Schmitz... - Journal of Heredity, 2026

Abstract: High-quality genomic resources are essential tools for conservation and management actions. We present a chromosome-level genome assembly for the false killer whale (Pseudorca crassidens, Owen, 1846), a large globicephaline ...

Alert: Erich Jarvis (author alert)

entry.title: Yan Ürünlerden ve Tarımsal-Gıda Atıklarından Sürdürülebilir Gıda Paketleme Gelişimi İçin Mikrobiyal Eksopolisakkarit (EPS) Üretimindeki Güncel Gelişmeler

entry.title: Chemical complexity in a young Class I protostellar disk

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: N Meduntseva

Abstract: Hot corinos are compact (<100 au), hot (> 100 K), and dense (>10^7 cm^-3) regions of solar-type protostars, characterized by a remarkable enrichment of interstellar complex organic molecules. These species are fundamental building blocks of ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life, Reviewer, Too: Consciousness, Reviewer, too: Physical Biology

Abstract: ... By engineering interactions between charged nanoparticles and protocell membrane, we modulated the contact and higher-order assembly behavior of protocells. We also achieved molecular weight-dependent and concentration ...

entry.title: Enhanced Abiotic RNA Homopolymer Formation in Recirculated Microdroplet Reactions

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: SE Pryor, MF Schaller, JT Shelley

Journal: 2026

Abstract: ... in origins - of - life and prebiotic chemistry has been relatively underexplored. Confined-volume systems, and particularly microdroplets, are becoming increasingly recognized for their ability to host and enable prebiotic ... (4.5 Ga) to ...

entry.title: Hemp protein functional properties, amino acid profile, and growth promotion of Lactiplantibacillus plantarum via ultrasound-induced Maillard reaction with Chito ...

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: N Chaiwong, M Gavahian, N Leksawasdi, SL Htike... - Food Chemistry, 2026

Abstract: This study developed an ultrasound-induced Maillard reaction (UMR) to conjugate hemp protein (HP) with chito-oligosaccharides (COS) and evaluate the resulting functional and biological enhancements. The optimal UMR condition (90 C, 1 h) ...

Abstract: ... Origins science, and specifically the chemical evolution program addressing the question of abiogenesis , ... prebiotic chemistry problem in Oparin's original model, which required polysaccharides that are not found in meteorites or are not ...

entry.title: Ancient History: The Origin of Earth Life and Its Consequences

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: JG Cramer - How to Live Much Longer: The Mitochondrial DNA ..., 2026

Abstract: ... emergence of life on Earth from the violent Hadean Era through the rise of mitochondria‑bearing eukaryotic "supercells," highlighting how early planetary conditions shaped biology's fundamental architecture. It follows the progression ...

Abstract: ... Rats were pretreated for 14 days with either broad-spectrum antibiotics or a prebiotic to ... prebiotic group showed a 3–4-fold increase in fatty acid release compared to the antibiotic group after 60 minutes of digestion (p < 0.0001) ...

entry.title: Phase separation induced by active polymerization makes protocells robust against environmental changes

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: X Chen, JU Sommer, TS Harmon - Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences, 2026

Abstract: ... Our findings show how nonequilibrium polymerization not only promotes protocell formation but also enhances their resilience to survive environmental fluctuations. This contrasts with equilibrium systems which do not show resilience to recrossing ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life, Reviewer, Too: Consciousness, Reviewer, too: Physical Biology

entry.title: Body mass index, prebiotic supplementation during pregnancy and gestational diabetes mellitus risk: an effect modification analysis from a randomised controlled trial

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: RA Pretorius, TR Sullivan, SVM Walker, J Garssen... - Nutrition Journal, 2026

Abstract: ... Prebiotic dietary supplementation has been shown to improve glucose homeostasis in type 2 diabetes patients. The aim of this analysis was to determine whether pre-pregnancy body mass index (BMI) modifies the effect of prebiotic ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life, Reviewer, Too: Consciousness, Reviewer, too: Physical Biology

entry.title: Continuing to Advance European High Contrast Imaging Research and Development towards HWO and LIFE
entry.content:

Abstract: ... This report represents a milestone for the European HCI community. It is a collective effort to consolidate expertise, define strategic ... the next generation of exoplanet exploration. As part of the RD-HCI II organization, following updates on the Roman ...
